testcase.name: test_summary_requires_auth
testcase.failure: tests/test_penalty_api.py:86: in test_summary_requires_auth assert r.status_code == 401, f"expected 401 got {r.status_code} body={r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: expected 401 got 403 body={"detail":"Unauthenticated!"} E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_recompute_requires_auth
testcase.failure: tests/test_penalty_api.py:110: in test_recompute_requires_auth assert r.status_code == 401, f"expected 401 got {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: expected 401 got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pending_requires_auth
testcase.failure: tests/test_penalty_api.py:161: in test_pending_requires_auth assert r.status_code == 401, f"expected 401 got {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: expected 401 got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
